section.div: Interact with replit from the shell!
World's Best API, no doubt about it.
🏷️ Expose your Discord presence and activities to a RESTful API and WebSocket in less than 10 seconds
An abstraction layer on top of @replit/crosis that makes Repl connection management and operations so easy, a Furret could do it! 🎉
